title: This AI Chinese model is 15X cheaper?
summary: MiniMax M3 is a long-context AI model launched on OpenRouter that uses sparse attention to achieve 15.6x faster processing and one-twentieth the compute cost of its predecessor. The model selectively attends to relevant parts of input documents while ignoring irrelevant sections.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, a long-context AI model launched on OpenRouter that applies sparse attention to cut processing cost and time. The mechanism selectively attends to relevant parts of input documents while ignoring irrelevant sections, which is what drives the efficiency gains. The concrete claims: 15.6x faster processing and one-twentieth the compute cost of the model's predecessor. The framing ties these results to test-time efficiency for long-context workloads.
